questions.text: The author's attitude the advent of computer technology can be best summarised as
The author would agree with which of the following statements?
options: The advent of computer technology has decreased access to libraries
Because of advancements in robotics, labour-intensive jobs are more plentiful
Although heralded as a great leap forward, the widespread use of computer technology is not without its setbacks
Of all the benefits ushered in by the use the internet. electronic email is the most beneficial

questions.text: The author's primary purpose in writing this passage is most likely which of the following?
options: To downplay the need for the internet
To explain how robotics and the internet have had both a positive and negative influence on how we live
To pave way for the next great technology revolution
To showcase the wonders of recent technology advancements

Term 'Prime Vertical' in astronomy is defined as
options: the vertical circle which passes through the east and west point of the horizon and is at right angles to the meridian of the place.
the vertical circle which passes through the north and south pain of he horizon and is at right angles to the meridian of the place.
the vertical circle which passes through the east and west pain of the horizon and is parallel to the meridian of the place.
the vertical circle which passes through the north and south point of the horizon and is parallel to the meridian of the place.
